title: Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd!
